calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998.

Petitioner Marivic M. Arce was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor, Analyn Marie Maramag.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Antonio Arce, the minor's father, was present, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Analyn Marie Arce.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Reset To Nov-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Reset To Sep-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: July 29, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, 3689.

Petitioner Marivic Arce was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Analyn Marie Maramag.
No Proof of Publication in file.

Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to September 4, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for hearing on Order to Show for Change of Name of a Minor.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
